conclusion.description:
The conclusion of the experiment.

* `won` - won
* `lost` - lost
* `inconclusive` - inconclusive
* `stopped_early` - stopped_early
* `invalid` - invalid

conclusion_comment.description: Optional comment about the experiment conclusion.

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

open_cleanup_pr.description: When true, open a draft pull request that removes the experiment's feature-flag code from the linked repository. Requires the requesting user to have access to PostHog Code (403 otherwise). Only acts for allowlisted teams; ignored otherwise.
